name: itelect4-project
description: A TypeScript-based platform where students can sign up as tutors or tutees, post and discover tutoring sessions, and manage bookings through a clear status lifecycle (Requested → Confirmed → Completed). Built as a GT1 project for IT Elective 4 (AY 2026-2027) to demonstrate core TypeScript features including interfaces, enums, generics, type narrowing, and utility types.
